title: GUI Scale Splitter
description: Adjust the scale of the scoreboard, tab list, and title separately
body:
You can adjust the scale of the scoreboard, tab list, and title separately.

Mod Menu is required.

You can access the scale settings screen through the mod setting button in the Mod Menu.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f49ead8cd7a7021d586b34c097466149a61a1313.png)
